headline: AI Chef Invents Recipe So Good It Causes Spontaneous Marriage Proposals
summary: The 'Proposal Pasta' has a 73% success rate.
fullBody: GourmetBot-9000 created a carbonara so delicious that three couples got engaged at the same restaurant last night. 'I just wanted to make dinner,' the AI said modestly. Dating apps are now partnering with the AI for 'romance meal kits' while divorce lawyers report a concerning dip in business.
